article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: The summary largely avoids the source’s loaded language, attributes charged characterizations to officials, and uses neutral phrasing. Minor issues include use of the politically loaded term "undocumented immigrant" and omission of the governor’s critical perspective, but overall framing is more neutral than the source.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (defended, reported, convicted) with minimal interpretive wording.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Key assertions are attributed to DHS/DOJ or court records; "allegedly" used for disputed actions.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Charged labels (e.g., 'mob of agitators') are quoted and attributed; minimal subjective narration.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Avoids tabloid flair and dramatic adjectives present in source.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions without attribution.
custom_reasoning.slant: Emphasizes DHS/Trump defenses; less attention to critical perspectives present in article context.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits Gov. Walz’s critical characterization of ICE mentioned in the article.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Uses 'undocumented immigrant' (politically loaded) and 'surge,' though largely neutral otherwise.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone mirrors article’s facts without amplifying negative framing.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Relies on official sources (DHS, DOJ, Trump); limited inclusion of non-official perspectives.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than source; avoids replicating emotional framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Misses at least one distinct perspective (Gov. Walz’s critique) present in source.
